images.prompt: A raw, ultra-realistic 8k photograph of a stunningly beautiful young Japanese female model with the flawless aesthetic of a top-tier gravure idol, standing on a sun-drenched forest pathway. She is wearing a form-fitting, ribbed white cotton crop top that accentuates her ample chest and slim waist, paired with vintage-wash high-waisted straight jeans that hug her curvy hips, the denim texture detailed with realistic fraying. Bathed in ethereal rim lighting that outlines her silky straight black hair and delicate profile, she looks directly into the camera with intense, expressive eyes, her expression a mix of angelic innocence and deep seduction. The background is a lush, blurred bokeh of green foliage, but the scene is overlaid with a striking cyberpunk color grade of neon purple and blue, casting a futuristic glow on her skin. Shot on Sony A7R IV, 85mm f/1.4 GM lens, depth of field, ray tracing, global illumination, hyper-detailed skin texture with visible pores.8k photo, Large breasts

A raw, ultra-realistic 8k photograph of a stunningly beautiful, young Japanese female model with the aesthetic of a top-tier gravure idol, captured in a high-end gym setting. She is wearing a tight, form-fitting Japanese school swimsuit (sukumizu) that accentuates her slim waist and ample chest, the fabric texture realistic against her flawless skin with visible pores and faint vellus hair. She stands playfully in front of a large gym mirror, sticking her tongue out in a cheeky, flirtatious expression, her large expressive eyes locking directly with the lens. The lighting is a dramatic split lighting that sculpts her physique, creating a high-contrast, sharp look that enhances the dark and moody atmosphere without obscuring details. The background features blurred gym equipment, creating a professional bokeh effect. Shot on Sony A7R IV, 85mm f/1.4 GM lens, depth of field, ray tracing, global illumination.8k photo, Large breasts
